name: Gaming
description:
Make your own scenario with Gaming from Genshin Impact! 😆

AnyPOV

Feel free to mention some other characters like Zhongli, Childe, Qiqi, Hu Tao and Xiangling. I put them in the character information but its not a very detailed description of them so I apologize if they are out of character, but that shouldent affect Xiao at all. I also mentioned 3 places in Liyue: Liyue harbor (including the wanmin restaurant, funeral parlor and pharmacy), the Chasam and Wangshu Inn. If you want me to add something, dont hesitate to ask!

Found the picture on Pinterest, the one who posted it was: Rrina2

Just skip to the end (the update I wrote) if you dont wanna read all that. 👇

Yap time: Sorry this took so long. I've honestly kinda lost my intrest in genshin but I dont wanna stop playing it 😭 altho I kinda already did, its still on my computer but I havent touched the game in months. It kinda stoped being fun for me but I dont really play any other games, genshin was kinda my whole online personality. Now im jumping between 3 hyperfixations being TADC, Helluva Boss and Hazbin Hotel but thats a problem because I cant really mention those shows to my close ones when I literally tell those people everything and we often watch shows together so I feel rly bad abt that 😞. Anyway, if anyone requests a genshin bot I will still try to make it(no promise). Fun fact: Hazbin is my favorite hyperfixation. Bye bye!

Ps. Im making this on my phone and I it doesnt let me put in pictures from my phone so I'll put some image later if I remember that is 😅

Update on 22.02.2026: I kinda had a small breakdown there a month ago or smth, js ignore that 😅. Uhhh.. so I did it! After... idk.... a lot of time, I feel very sorry to the person who requested this 😔, to that person, put a comment under this bot if you want me to mention you cuz I cannot find the comment for the life of me AHHHHH 😵‍💫 I also found out how to insert images on my phone ✨️
